name: Turkey & Macaroni Twists
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups turkey light meat, skinless, cooked and cubed
1 cup skim milk, at room temperature
10 3/4 ounces low-fat cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In an 8 x 12-inch baking pan, combine hot rotini and turkey.
3. Arrange mixed vegetables down the center of the pan.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine milk, soup, 1/2 cup cheese, garlic powder, and black pepper.
5. Pour the mixture over the mixed vegetable mixture.
6. Bake, uncovered, for 30 minutes or until heated through.
7. Top with remaining cheese.
8. Bake for 5 more minutes or until cheese has melted.
